meta.title: Turning cargo planes in missile-packing arsenal planes!
meta.description:
The Air Force's Rapid Dragon program allows cargo planes like the C-130 and C-17 to deploy huge numbers of AGM-158 JASSM cruise missiles from hundreds of miles away, well outside the reach of enemy air defenses. 

#shorts #airpower #rapiddragon #missiles #missile #cruisemissile #aviation #technology #defense #airforce
